brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (B) with valid chronological ordering and correct count of 2 nodes at T2's start; goes one level beyond surface by noting the majority threshold and T2's read safety implication, but no second-order analysis of consistency models or protocol edge cases; presents reasoning linearly with no explicit bias-checking or assumption-naming; performs basic verification by listing all acks chronologically and cross-referencing against T2's timestamp; acknowledges T2 cannot safely read T1 but offers no structured uncertainty framing or confidence levels; does not evaluate or explain why the other options (A, C, D) are wrong, missing an opportunity to address why C is a plausible distractor; every derivation step is shown explicitly — timestamps listed, ordering confirmed, cutoff checked — fully reproducible by a third party.
